creator: stjack99@gmail.com
text:
When I make NAnt (/usr/ports/devel/nant), the build fails with output:

-----
Buildfile: file:///usr/ports/devel/nant/work/nant-0.90/NAnt.build
Target framework: Mono 2.0 Profile
Target(s) specified: Merge Overwrite

   [tstamp] Wednesday, 22 June 2011 19:42:57.

BUILD FAILED

Target 'Merge' does not exist in this project.

Total time: 0.1 seconds.

gmake: *** [build-nant] Error 1
*** Error code 1

Stop in /usr/ports/devel/nant.
-----

Installed version of mono (from ports) is 2.10.2

How-To-Repeat: 1) cd /usr/ports/devel/nant
2) make

Result: build will fail
